description: 167 - 03-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO) and

participants.name: Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
(former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO) and

others

From: Peter Mandelson Personal
Sent: Thur 03/04/2025 6:47:04 PM (UTC)
To: Oliver Robbins Personal , Moraan McSweeney
Personal Varun Chandra Personal ,
“Ailsa Terry (No.10)" Personal , Caroline Hurndall
Personal . Michael Ellam
Personal , "Jonathan Black (Cabinet Office)
(External)" Personal
Ce: James Roscoe Personal . Mungo Woodifield
Personal , veo
Personal
Subject: RE: Tariffs - one day later and next steps
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
The iurv is out. ***

A lot of people will think it’s just more politics.
But others will say “about time we sorted out all the freeloaders” whether it is
transformative or not.

So Republicans will be listening out to their districts and waiting to see the impact.
Depending on what happens in the markets, the political marketplace might follow.

Peter

Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washinaton DC

Personal | Personal
From: Oliver Robbins Personal
Sent: 03 April 2025 14:36
To: Peter Mandelson Personal ; Morgan McSweeney
Personal ; Varun Chandra Personal Ailsa Terry (No.10)
Personal ; Caroline Hurndall Personal ; Michael Ellam
Versonal ; Jonathan Black (Cabinet Office) (External)
Personal
Cc: James Roscoe Personal ; Mungo Woodifield
Personal . JCS Personal

Subject: Re: Tariffs - one day later and next steps

Peter

V helpful to see, thank you.
What has the domestic political reaction been like? Is there any significant domestic 
(inc Congressional) opposition that might act on the Administration?  
 
 
Olly
—
Oliver Robbins
FCDO
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Peter Mandelson 
Sent: Thursday, April 3, 2025 5:10 pm
To: Morgan McSweeney
 Varun Chandra 
; Ailsa Terry (No.10) 
; Oliver Robbins 
; Caroline Hurndall 
; Michael 
Ellam 
; Jonathan Black (Cabinet Office) (External) 
Cc: James Roscoe 
; Mungo Woodifield 
; 
 
Subject: Tariffs - one day later and next steps
All,
A day after President Trump's tariff announcement, some initial observations from 
here and thoughts on next steps.
 
 
 
 
 
JCS
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal

Lord Mandelson

Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
